summary: Do not ship yet: the TTS/STT timeout fix is resolved, but the mic lifecycle fix is incomplete and the sessions split still lacks a safe migration path for existing compositions.

findings.title: Microphone can still start after the chat pane unmounts
findings.recommendation: Add a mounted/cancelled guard around the awaited getUserMedia path. If the component unmounts before permission resolves, immediately stop the returned stream tracks and return without constructing/starting MediaRecorder. Also keep cleanup from posting STT or setting state after unmount.

findings.title: Sessions split leaves pre-existing compositions un-migrated
findings.recommendation: Migrate selections by fitting id when normalizing/reading/writing compositions: re-bucket moved ids to their current library metadata faculty while preserving config, then validate. Add a regression fixture with pre-split sessions containing codex/gemini/browser/screen-share.
